## Change

Describe the user-visible behavior changed by this pull request.

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests cover the public behavior.
- [ ] `make test` passes.
- [ ] `make list` finds both skills.
- [ ] Legal or procedural changes cite a current official source and retrieval date.
- [ ] Examples are synthetic or fully de-identified.
- [ ] No unpublished invention, client material, credentials, filing identifier, or deadline data is included.

## Human-review gates

Explain whether the change affects claim scope, amendment support, legal conclusions, deadlines, confidentiality, or filing decisions.
